subject: Quotation Request – Vehicle No. Toyota Aqua - QAY557 – Quotation No. Q-2026-0042
text:
Dear Supplier,

I hope you are doing well.

We would like to request a quotation for the following parts for Vehicle No. Toyota Aqua - QAY557, under Quotation No. Q-2026-0042.

1. Toyota Aqua Front Bumper (Qty: 1)
2. Toyota Aqua Left Headlight (Qty: 1)

Kindly provide your best possible pricing for the above items by completing the quotation form provided through the secure link below or reply to this email with the pricing for the above items.

Please submit your quotation using your unique link below:
  • NZ Parts Supply Ltd: https://autoquote.ceylonautomobile.co.nz/vendor-quotation-response/sample-token-primary
  • Auto Parts Direct: https://autoquote.ceylonautomobile.co.nz/vendor-quotation-response/sample-token-bcc1
  • Pacific Spares: https://autoquote.ceylonautomobile.co.nz/vendor-quotation-response/sample-token-bcc2

Thank you for your support. We look forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,

Ceylon Automobile
https://ceylonautomobile.co.nz/
13 Cranwell Street, Henderson, Auckland 0612
Phone: 021 214 7160

1 reference image(s) attached to this email.
